gold: Hi, yeah, Anna. I'm trying to, well basically, I'm going to be taking a big vacation and I'm trying to bring a couple of people with me. And so, I'm going to need to spend a lot of money. And I'm kind of confused right now what my credit limit is because I could have sworn that when I signed the papers is that my credit limit was going to be up near about 25 grand. But, people been telling me with this credit card, all it is is about 8 grand. 8 grand is not going to cover it so I need to know what's going on.

sigWerErrors.reason: 'is' was replaced with 'and', resulting in 'when I signed the papers and stuff, my credit limit...' instead of 'when I signed the papers is that my credit limit...'. This changes the grammatical structure but does not significantly alter the meaning of the sentence.
'been' was changed to 'have been' in 'people have been telling me' instead of 'people been telling me'. This is a grammatical correction and does not change the meaning.
